checkout.agreementText: By proceeding with the purchase, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.;All sales are final and non-refundable unless otherwise stated in our refund policy.;In special cases such as stock shortages, we may contact you and you may choose a partial or full refund.;Items will be delivered via RSI gift to the email address associated with your account at registration. Please make sure you can access that inbox.;This agreement is translated from the English version, and the English version shall prevail.

pathBuilder.joyride.content.create: After setting everything up, click this button to generate and review the route before adding it to the canvas.

pathBuilder.joyride.content.targetShip: Choose the final ship you want to reach. The selectable list is filtered based on price progression.

pathBuilder.marketRouteHeadlineBreakdown: Route savings {routeSavings} + Store Credit discount savings {creditSavings}

pathBuilder.marketRouteListingHint: This step can be bought immediately from the market at the current lowest listed price.

pathBuilder.marketRouteOfficialHint: This step falls back to a current official upgrade when no suitable market listing is available.

resourcesTable.column.name: Name
routeInfoPanel.conciergeTooltip: Fill in how many dollars it costs you to get $1 of concierge value. If you don't care about concierge value, enter 0. The actual cost of upgrading is calculated as dollars spent + RMB spent * exchange rate * (1 + concierge conversion ratio)
routeInfoPanel.newInvestmentExplanation: New investment includes costs from the last completed edge to the target ship, excluding hangar CCUs. If there are no completed edges, it will include the start ship price plus all non-hangar CCUs.
routeInfoPanel.noPrice: Some CCUs in this route are no longer valid
routeInfoPanel.pruneOptTooltip: If checked, the upgrade paths have been pruned to ensure calculations can be completed in a reasonable time. Only the first path is guaranteed to be optimal, not all possible alternatives are guaranteed to be shown
routeInfoPanel.routesTooltip: The upgrade paths have been pruned to ensure calculations can be completed in a reasonable time. Only the first path is guaranteed to be optimal, not all possible alternatives are guaranteed to be shown
routeInfoPanel.sortByNewInvestmentToolti: If checked, routes will be sorted by new investment cost. The cost of completed routes and hangar CCUs will not be included in the new investment.
routeInfoPanel.title: Alternative Upgrade Routes
settings.avatarDescription: The avatar you want to display to others.

settings.avatarUploadHint: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP images up to 5MB.
settings.ccuPriorityDescription: Set the priority order of CCUs' sources. Types with higher priority will be considered first for upgrade paths.
settings.ccuPriorityDragHint: Drag items to change the priority of CCU types. Types with higher priority will be considered first for upgrade paths.
settings.clearAllDataDescription: Clear all local data, including all user data and settings. This action cannot be undone.

settings.confirmClearImportDescription: This action will clear all imported hangar data. This action cannot be undone.

settings.currencyDescription: The currency you prefer to use when setting up a link using third-party CCUs.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone, and all data associated with your account will be permanently deleted.
